{{Quote|I was buyin' a spice shipment from Nem'ro when some laser-brained smuggler outbid me. The smuggler offered up Nem'ro's favorite snack-Adegan eels|Getzo|<ref name="TOR">{{TORcite|type=faction|Empire|To Boom or Not to Boom|Hutta}}</ref>}}
'''Adegan eels''' were snake-like creatures indigenous to [[Adega]].

They were also eaten by the royalty of [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]]. The leaders of the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] used the [[Eel/Legends|eels]] in the takeover of the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]].

When trying to buy [[Spice/Legends|spice]] from [[Suudaa Nem'ro|Nem'ro the Hutt]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], [[Nokril]] offered him Adegan eels. The spice dealer [[Getzo]] wished to buy Nem'ro's spice and hired an individual to destroy Nokril's eel tanks.<ref name="TOR" />

{{Creature-stub}}
